---
title: "IFCD0210 Sprint Backlog"
categories: [ifcd0210, backlog]
toc: true
number-sections: false
format:
  html
filters:
   - lightbox
lightbox: true
---

<style>

.heatMap th { background:  #f4f4f4;}
tr:nth-child(3) {background-color: #f4f4f4;}
tr:nth-child(6) {background-color: #f4f4f4;}
th, td {
  padding: 8px;
  text-align: left;
  border-bottom: 1px solid #ddd;
}

tr:hover {background-color:  #f4f4f4;}

</style>

![Sprint Backlog](/images/home/backlog.jpg){width="30%"}

<div class="heatMap">

::: {.column-page-right}

##  ``Sprint#19: graphQL & noSQL, openCode AI`` (April 2026)

| # | Day | Date | Topics |  Details Topics |
| -- | -- | -- | -- | -- |
|  **#19** | 63 | 20/04/2026 |    - Spring Boot AWS `personNoSQL` Sandbox: </br> (1) noSql: pK and sK </br> (2) `Teacher` / `Student` /`Person` document/`item` (gsheet) </br>  (3) `noSqlPerson` how to relate items? Pk? Social Club? Programming courses? Catalonia elementary schools?</br> (4) Defining **unique-table** </br>  (5) Spring Boot **graphQL** </br> (6) Test with GraphiQL **Playground** / Postman  </br> (7) **create a subscription**: `createPerson`  </br> </br>  - Reactive Programming: `Webflux`: `Flux`, `Sink`, `Publisher`, ... </br> - **Pub-Sub** pattern  | - [noSqlPerson: xxxx](https://github.com/AlbertProfe/noSqlPerson/tree/xxxxxx){.external target='_blank'}  </br>    - [SpreadSheet NoSql person](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1UYVKKlaXtwYl7nI-MfBhrRZpycEDlwbtR0srz7UiSLg/edit?usp=sharing){.external target='_blank'}  </br></br> - [Choosing the Right DynamoDB Partition Key](https://aws.amazon.com/blogs/database/choosing-the-right-dynamodb-partition-key/){.external target='_blank'} </br> - [What is a NoSQL database?](https://www.ibm.com/think/topics/nosql-databases){.external target='_blank'} </br> - [Key Concepts](https://www.dynamodbguide.com/key-concepts/){.external target='_blank'} </br> - [Spring for GraphQL](https://spring.io/projects/spring-graphql){.external target='_blank'}  </br> - [Getting started with Spring for GraphQL](https://www.graphql-java.com/tutorials/getting-started-with-spring-boot){.external target='_blank'}  </br> - [Adding GraphQL Subscriptions](https://github.com/AlbertProfe/noSqlPerson/blob/master/doc/SUBSCRIPTION_GUIDE.md){.external target='_blank'} </br> - [personNoSql + graphQL](https://github.com/AlbertProfe/noSqlPerson/blob/master/doc/personNoSql_graphQL.md){.external target='_blank'} </br> - [How schema works](https://graphql.org/learn/schema/){.external target='_blank'} </br> ![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/AlbertProfe/noSqlPerson/refs/heads/master/doc/screenshots/graphql-i-5.png){.lightbox width=80% fig-align="center"}  </br> - [Web on Reactive Stack](https://docs.spring.io/spring-framework/reference/web-reactive.html){.external target='_blank'} </br>|
|   | 64 | 21/04/2026 |  - Spring Boot AWS `personNoSQL` Sandbox:  | - [noSqlPerson: xxxx](https://github.com/AlbertProfe/noSqlPerson/tree/xxxx){.external target='_blank'}  </br>|
|   |    | | |
|   |   65 | 23/04/2026   | - `ApartmentPrediction-React_masterDoc`: **v6.2**, school `CREATE` </br> (0) form  for create new `School`  </br> (1) logic for `School`, new school and assign apartment  </br>  (3) map with schools </br></br> | - [api tools](https://github.com/AlbertProfe/ApartmentPredictor-React/blob/9c4d459744d95a310874f4d64cc7900b07fc7583/ApartmentPredictor-React/.opencode/tools/api.ts){.external target='_blank'} </br>  - [Rules](https://opencode.ai/docs/rules/){.external target='_blank'} / - [Skills](https://opencode.ai/docs/skills/){.external target='_blank'} / - [Tools](https://opencode.ai/docs/tools/){.external target='_blank'} </br></br>- [dataModel-refactor: repo at refactor-middleware-data-2](https://github.com/AlbertProfe/ApartmentPredictor-React/tree/refactor-middleware-data-2/ApartmentPredictor-React/dataModel-refactor){.external target='_blank'}  </br> </br> - [Spring Boot AI vs OpenCode](/images/ifcd0210-26/docs/OpenCode_vs_SpringBoot%20AIAgents_%20Orchestration.md){.external target='_blank'}  </br> - [OpenCode Multi-Agent](/images/ifcd0210-26/docs/OpenCodeMulti-Agent.md){.external target='_blank'}  </br></br> - [OpenCode:folders](/images/ifcd0210-26/docs/openCode-folders.md){.external target='_blank'} </br> ![](/images/ifcd0210-26/opencode-createSchool.png){.lightbox width=80% fig-align="center"} </br> - [ApartmentPrediction-React at refactor-middleware-data-2: 34f17ec](https://github.com/AlbertProfe/ApartmentPredictor-React/tree/34f17ec4a81bd9704ab075956e10c179d798c551){.external target='_blank'}|
|   |  66  | 24/04/2026 | - Java Spring Boot: </br> (0) ApartmentPrediction_masterDoc: **v7** </br> (1) `Renovation` domain  </br></br>   |  |
: Backlog Sprint#19 April 2026 {tbl-colwidths="[2,2,2,55,39]"}
:::

</div>

::: {.callout-note}
- `---------` <s>topic pending</s>
- `-` topic done in class
- `++` new topic not planned
:::
